title: selinum filicifolium
intro: Selinum filicifolium, also known as fern-leaved celery or wild celery, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
